pageTranscription.text:
Mock page transcription: check tire pressure weekly.

Keep chain lubricated every 500 km.

items.name: Engine oil
items.notes: Original: every 8 000 km (5 000 mi) or 12 months; initial change at 1 000 km (600 mi)

items.name: Engine oil filter
items.notes: Replace with every second oil change

items.name: Air cleaner element
items.notes: Service more frequently when riding in dusty areas

items.name: Drive chain
items.notes: Clean and lubricate every 1 000 km (600 mi) and after riding in rain

items.name: Brake fluid
items.notes: Replace every 2 years regardless of distance
